A local-first Windows desktop tool for c: A local-first Windows desktop tool for calculating file hashes and safely cleaning duplicate files.

Bug reports, feature requests, GitHub st: Bug reports, feature requests, GitHub stars, and sponsorship are all appreciated. Thank you for supporting the project.

HashSieve — recursive hash and duplicate: HashSieve — recursive hash and duplicate-file cleaner
Hashing complete. Found {groups} duplica: Hashing complete. Found {groups} duplicate group(s), {dupes} duplicate file(s).
Hashing files... The result table will b: Hashing files... The result table will be built after hashing finishes.
If enabled, folder shortcuts/symlinks ca: If enabled, folder shortcuts/symlinks can be followed during recursive scanning. Keep this off unless you need it, because symlinks may point outside the dragged folder or create loops.
Ignore empty files when grouping duplica: Ignore empty files when grouping duplicates

Please stop or wait for scanning/hashing: Please stop or wait for scanning/hashing to finish first.
Ready. Drag files or folders into the wi: Ready. Drag files or folders into the window, or use Add Files / Add Folder.
Remove all rows from the list? This does: Remove all rows from the list? This does not delete files from disk.
Restore all settings to their default va: Restore all settings to their default values?

Scanning/hashing is still running. Exit: Scanning/hashing is still running. Exit anyway?
Selected {count} duplicate copy/copies w: Selected {count} duplicate copy/copies while keeping one file in each group. You can Ctrl-click to adjust the selection before deleting.

There is no data to export.
Type DELETE to permanently delete the se: Type DELETE to permanently delete the selected files:
When enabled, 0-byte empty files are sti: When enabled, 0-byte empty files are still listed and hashed, but they are not placed into duplicate groups. This helps avoid accidentally deleting intentional placeholder files such as __init__.py.
You are using the latest version.
send2trash is not installed, so recycle-: send2trash is not installed, so recycle-bin deletion is unavailable. The operation will be cancelled.
